description: baseline with autoresearch harness and P0 docs/editor groundwork

asi.hypothesis: Establish real-check migration metric before making Effect v4 harness changes.
asi.baseline_failures: 4 failing gates: validate script missing, Effect v4 deps not migrated, old repos/effect present, repos/effect-smol missing.
asi.next_action_hint: Port low-risk reference/harness pieces first: replace old Effect subtree with effect-smol, add validate script, then migrate deps/tests.

description: replace old Effect subtree with effect-smol reference and add vendor refresh scripts

asi.hypothesis: Removing old repos/effect and adding repos/effect-smol should satisfy the vendored-reference gate without touching application code.
asi.result: effect-smol-reference gate now passes; remaining failures are validate script missing and Effect v4 deps.
asi.next_action_hint: Add a real validate script/runner next to reduce missing-validate gate, then migrate dependencies/tests.

description: add effect-smol reference and initial validate gate

asi.hypothesis: A current-check validate script plus vendored-reference replacement should reduce migration gates while preserving existing check behavior.
asi.result: validate now runs current check suite; effect-smol-reference passes; remaining metric failures are knip debt and Effect v4 dependency migration.
asi.commit_issue_resolution: Previous keep commit was blocked by lefthook touching vendored/log files; added repos/** lefthook excludes and ignored autoresearch logs so hooks can run cleanly.
asi.next_action_hint: Migrate dependency/test harness to Effect v4 and tune strict dependency checks (knip/fallow) without weakening real validation.

description: discard broad Effect v4 API/dependency migration despite typecheck success due regressed gates

asi.hypothesis: Migrating dependencies and Effect v4 APIs broadly would clear the dependency gate while preserving or improving validation failures.
asi.result: typecheck and effect-v4-deps passed, but lint, format, test, knip, and validate failed; failing_checks regressed from 2 to 5.
asi.rollback_reason: Primary metric worsened; migration changed too much at once and introduced formatting/lint/test harness failures.
asi.next_action_hint: Reapply Effect v4 dependency/test harness migration in smaller slices: first migrate root/package deps with Vitest config and update test imports to avoid bun: loader/FastCheck failures, then format/lint before measuring.

description: clean up knip findings while preserving validation

asi.hypothesis: Resolving actual unused files/exports and documenting external flyctl usage will make the strict knip gate pass without weakening validation.
asi.result: knip now passes; typecheck, lint, format, test, validate, vendored reference, and no-warden gates pass. Only effect-v4-deps remains.
asi.changes: Removed dead to-web-handler and useUserId files, dropped unused public exports, documented seed SQL export as package script, and ignored the external flyctl binary used by deploy.
asi.next_action_hint: Migrate Effect dependencies to v4 in a small, formatted slice; use the previous discarded attempt as a map but keep Bun tests stable until API changes compile and pass.
